name: accordion
title: Accordion
description: Expandable sections with single or multiple open items.

api.description: Expandable sections for FAQs, changelogs, and settings groups. Compose Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, and AccordionContent. Supports single or multiple open items, sizes, dividers, and keyboard focus between triggers.

props.name: type
props.description: single opens one item at a time. multiple lets several items stay open.

props.name: collapsible
props.description: For type single only. When true, clicking the open item closes it. When false, one item always stays open.

props.name: variant
props.description: default is a connected list with dividers. ghost is a flush embed. separated renders each item as its own bordered card with a gap between rows (dividers off by default).

props.name: size
props.description: Trigger padding and title or content type scale.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius step on the root. Maps to a --radius-* token (default --radius-3xl). Steps scale from the project --radius set at create or init. Use none for square corners.

props.name: background
props.description: Root shell fill. Prefer theme semantics such as var(--card). Sets --df-accordion-bg.

props.name: triggerBackground
props.description: Header fill for every trigger. Runs edge to edge on connected and ghost variants (inline padding lives on the trigger). Prefer theme semantics such as var(--muted) so light and dark stay readable. Absolute neutrals stay fixed and can break on dark surfaces. Sets --df-accordion-trigger-bg. Override per row with AccordionTrigger background.

props.name: contentBackground
props.description: Open panel fill for every item. Runs edge to edge on connected and ghost variants (inline padding lives on the content body). Prefer a theme-aware mix such as color-mix(in oklch, var(--muted) 40%, var(--card)). Absolute neutrals stay fixed and can break on dark surfaces. Sets --df-accordion-content-bg. Override per row with AccordionContent background.

props.name: contentPadding
props.description: Block padding on open panels only. Omit to keep the size-based bottom padding used by regular accordions. Set when using contentBackground so filled panels can inset without changing default size spacing.

props.name: showDividers
props.description: Draw a hairline under each item. The last item never shows a trailing divider. Separated defaults to false unless you set this explicitly.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable every item in the accordion.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled open state. string or null for single; string array for multiple.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open state.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when open state changes.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the root.

groups.title: AccordionItem
groups.description: One expandable row. Owns the value shared by its trigger and content.

props.name: value
props.description: Unique item value (required).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Non interactive item. Trigger stays closed.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional DOM id on the item wrapper.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the item.

groups.title: AccordionTrigger
groups.description: Button that toggles the item. Supports title, subtitle, meta, leading, and a custom indicator.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger title.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Secondary line under the title. Pass text or any React node.

props.name: meta
props.description: Optional trailing metadata before the indicator (for example a date).

props.name: leading
props.description: Optional leading icon or mark before the title. Pass any React node. When set, panel body text indents to align under the title.

props.name: indicator
props.description: Replace the default chevron. Pass null to hide the indicator.

props.name: background
props.description: Header fill for this trigger only. Prefer theme semantics such as var(--muted). Sets --df-accordion-trigger-bg on the button.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable this trigger only.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the trigger button.

groups.title: AccordionContent
groups.description: Animated panel for the item body. Uses grid row expand and collapse with reduced motion support.

props.name: children
props.description: Panel body.

props.name: background
props.description: Panel fill for this content only. Prefer a theme-aware mix with var(--muted) and var(--card). Sets --df-accordion-content-bg on the panel.

props.name: forceMount
props.description: Keep content mounted when closed so the height animation can run. Set false to unmount when closed.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the inner content.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --radius
props.description: Base corner radius from create or init (df-ui init --radius). Every --radius-* step derives from this value.

props.name: --radius-3xl
props.description: Default radius step when radius is 3xl. The radius prop selects any --radius-* step from none to full.

props.name: --df-accordion-bg
props.description: Root shell fill. Set with the background prop or override on :root / the host.

props.name: --df-accordion-item-bg
props.description: Separated item card fill. Used when variant is separated.

props.name: --df-accordion-trigger-bg
props.description: Header (trigger) fill. Edge to edge on connected and ghost variants. Set with triggerBackground or AccordionTrigger background.

props.name: --df-accordion-content-bg
props.description: Open panel fill. Edge to edge on connected and ghost variants. Set with contentBackground or AccordionContent background.

props.name: --df-accordion-pad-inline
props.description: Horizontal padding on triggers and content bodies for connected and ghost variants. Keeps fills full width while inseting text.

props.name: --df-accordion-content-pad-block-start
props.description: Top padding on open panel bodies when contentPadding is set.

props.name: --df-accordion-content-pad-block-end
props.description: Bottom padding on open panel bodies when contentPadding is set.

props.name: --df-accordion-radius
props.description: Resolved corner radius from the radius prop. Applied to the root, or to each item when variant is separated.

props.name: --border
props.description: Hairline color for item dividers when showDividers is true.

props.name: --df-duration-panel
props.description: Open and close duration for the panel and chevron.

props.name: --df-ease-decelerate
props.description: Easing for the panel expand and chevron rotate.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.
